**What's inaccurate?**
- [ ] Seed pattern assigned to wrong type

- [ ] Calibration default doesn't fit
- [ ] Assessment question doesn't differentiate this type
- [ ] Wing description is off

**What's wrong and why?**
Be specific. Reference Enneagram sources if possible.

What should it say instead?
